title: AgentForge Role Definition
description: Schema for validating Role TOML frontmatter in .agents/roles/*.md files

id.description: Unique role identifier in kebab-case, must match filename (without .md)

domain.description: Domain this role belongs to (e.g., engineering, governance, infrastructure)

bindings.description: Default context bindings loaded when an agent assumes this role

skills.description: Skill identifiers bound to this role

permissions.description: File access permissions for agents assuming this role

can_modify.description: Glob patterns of files this role is allowed to modify

cannot_modify.description: Glob patterns of files this role must not modify
